notes: All 276 original nodes had valid IDs, known types, and valid complexity values (simple/moderate/complex) — no mechanical fixes were needed.

10 function/class nodes were disconnected from their parent file nodes due to missing 'contains' edges across batch boundaries: _validate_model_provider in cli.py; is_cached and mark_cached in _cache.py; strip_markdown_fences, strip_preamble, and LLMInvocationError in _llm.py; ensure_runs_directories in _paths.py; emit_stale_warnings in filters.py; DriverNotInitialisedError in driver.py; UnknownSourceSectionError in populator.py. All 10 'contains' edges were restored.

1 node recovered: file:migration_oracle/extractors/__init__.py (legacy extractor registry that predates pipeline/extractors rewrite). The scan result importMap had an entry for this file but no corresponding node existed in the graph. The file physically exists at migration_oracle/extractors/__init__.py and imports migration_oracle/models/changes.py.

11 'configures' edges added from file:tests/extractors/conftest.py to all 11 test files in that directory (conftest provides the anyio_backend fixture).

28 nodes remain disconnected after all fixes: 3 JSON config files (.specify/), 4 standalone scripts/binary blobs (PowerShell, bash, .skill files), and 21 skill documentation files (.claude/skills/ and .cursor/skills/ SKILL.md documents). These have no import relationships and are genuinely peripheral — no action taken.
All inherits edges are correctly directed child->parent (e.g. SpringBootExtractor inherits BaseExtractor). No reversed edge directions found.
Final graph: 277 nodes, 433 edges, 0 dangling edges.
